cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13)
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE on)

        hermes_executor_common

)

if(${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE} MATCHES Debug)
        target_compile_options(
                hermes_executor_common
                PRIVATE
                -DHERMES_ENABLE_DEBUGGER=1
        )
else()
        target_compile_options(
                hermes_executor_common
                PRIVATE
                -DNDEBUG
        )
endif()
